title: Register required secrets centrally
description: Rule for packages that declare, read, validate, or rotate secrets.
contextText:
Feature packages must register required secrets through ServerHelperConfiguration.Config.Secrets.Require(...).
Read secret values through the central SecretManager instead of custom IConfiguration lookups scattered through feature code.
Validate all registered secrets from one central host point after package configuration calls have completed.
Never log secret values; diagnostics may show missing keys and setup instructions only.
PreProduction and Production must fail closed when required secrets are missing.
